name: The Winning Dice Tour
overview: The special winning prize for the winner of "World Dice Tour 2," Kwaktube, is revealed! With his partners, Joon Park and Kang Ki Young, he goes on a super luxurious trip to Ulleung Island, where a high-end hotel is waiting for them!

trailers.title: [#지구마불우승여행] 티저 | 지구마불 시즌2의 우승자! 여행왕이 된 곽튜브의 우승 여행! | ENA 채널
